homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment is an alternative rock track featuring a male vocalist singing over steady drumming and keyboard harmony. The music maintains a romantic and groovy atmosphere, blending indie influences with youthful energy.

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This animated Electronic/Synthpop track features a male lead vocalist backed by singers, delivering a romantic and emotional narrative driven by steady drumming and keyboard harmonies. The composition blends a strong bass line with piano melodies to create a medium-tempo ballad well-suited for scenes in a romantic movie.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece blends electronic elements with traditional Chinese instruments like the guzheng and pipa to create a mysterious and adventurous soundscape. A steady, percussive rhythm drives the track, supporting a repetitive melodic line that maintains an engaging momentum throughout. The fusion of modern synthesis with authentic cultural percussion adds a distinct layer of depth to this experimental composition.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track explores the vastness of space using atmospheric synthesizers and expansive effects like reverb to create an ethereal soundscape. The slow tempo and lack of vocals foster a sense of mystery, allowing listeners to fully immerse themselves in this otherworldly electronic piece.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: A male vocalist raps over a driving synth bass and piano melody within a hip-hop track that maintains a dark, intense atmosphere. A strong and steady drum beat propels the medium-tempo groove, creating a serious mood suitable for scenes in a crime drama or video game.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This intense instrumental track blends fast-paced metal influences with electronic elements to create a loud and aggressive mood. A driving rhythm, supported by heavy bass lines and sharp synthesizers, generates a sense of urgency perfect for high-energy action scenes or video game boss battles. The overall sound feels dark and powerful, seamlessly merging underground punk energy with modern electronic textures.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This orchestral composition features a prominent string section that provides a steady, dramatic pulse throughout the track. While electronic synthesizers add layers of depth and richness to the sound, the overall atmosphere remains somber and melancholic. The piece evokes a sense of introspection and sadness, making it well-suited for scenes involving loss or deep emotional weight.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
